channel.title: WorldBuilder
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates

item.title: WorldBuilder 0.1.0+261
item.description:
## Changes
- Dungeon editor improvements: autofurnish, portal cache, undo fix, cell reclaim, UX ([9a0dbc3](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/9a0dbc39f95ac84f0c27a7657425432c04e9ca8c)) - fix fill tool preview ([f29948e](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/f29948ee1f8496447b1c4936a9b2bd88435b4d4a)) - Changelog from commit messages; add release.yml ([af985b2](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/af985b28bd3dd9f0fd147ca66fdcc7147e80dedd)) - make dungeon view fill ([b9ffe3e](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/b9ffe3eb5a64643dc78da86b7453378b54c88ac5)) - more fixes ([b671cee](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/b671ceec43e217d57eca58d1f2b5b0151841a3e8)) - Merge PR #12: Maximize editor window ([ac4177e](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/ac4177e4f0f7bd61f7ba35d9f170e1ecfe5c1dac)) - Merge PR #11: Fix LayoutDesc position and child nodes ([b8d228e](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/b8d228ec144b796c43f0906938c1947cbc05af1d)) - fix EnvCell log spam: deduplicate retry preparation, demote verbose logging to Debug ([75fb32e](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/75fb32eec78eae0cfcac5c2e8475504f39321da9)) - add ACE DB instance placements: weenie picker, dungeon/landscape placement panels, DB import with position fix ([d512ef2](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/d512ef21396f437684992e93a219390114aff78e)) - dungeon gen v3: branching/size controls, AABB overlap, yaw snap; portal capping system; export pipeline fixes (portal ordering, OtherPortalId rewrite, visibility stabs); KB v14 with dead-end index and style themes ([0aec0dc](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/0aec0dcfd88fd807a75bc2294a0e29535750bb5b)) - Maximize editor window ([e619002](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/e619002c71b8e334eb9c1fff8756549ccb69bf74)) - Fix LayoutDesc position and child nodes ([a858af7](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/a858af70a0766a511a2d0ecd91f48d8896443f0a)) - change camera down to c ([8847c28](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/8847c2852d0fabbf22dfa376d1ed2fc29db02a3b)) - fix dungeon generator(NOT COMPLETE,WORKS ALOT BETTER BUT NOT 'DONE'): portal alignment, yaw-only orientation, capping, and portal flags ([ff36b20](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/ff36b20b109b590d9a5d10d139612a30df8b794f)) - grid and recenter view for dungeon editor ([675fb1d](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/675fb1d97278766620b3f4f181130d19c12d9d58)) - fix dungeon dock crash ([40e9567](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/40e956764d24572abca15bd56cce5ce91ee2a660)) - add history to dungeon editor ([c66b13f](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/c66b13fe16451da5372def0de6c33635249e5599)) - feat: heightmap import, export progress + static repositioning, bulk terrain/ACE DB and history tweaks ([5faec77](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/5faec770aba1e9f97422f6161e532530b9a25d23)) - Dungeon generator v2: favorites-driven generation, room furnishing, and selection visualization ([f45e230](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/f45e2306a637b9fcc14f1e83ec2b18c4be01d944)) - add sql connector to export, or direct change DB to move objects up or down if height change done in overworld ([67912c1](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/67912c1c7a27892e8a017f9533e07daffa4b6be5)) - More prefab stuff, work on generator for dungeons, added favorites, cell/room ([7b89961](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/7b89961774b4a25af3d28bd92d57443be92aa44d)) - more prefab stuff ([da88e74](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/da88e741a0e5c0555af1c1746dea64413db7472a)) - Dungeon editor refactor, landscape shader fix, document save/settings bug fixes ([b8a09dd](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/b8a09dd989f0ad0abe75930c692683ae61a38b6d)) - improve dungeon editor render loop ([d7d0205](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/d7d020520afc41908a2ba3beeaa38d9227c2a0d6)) - more performance stuff ([8a478a8](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/8a478a8a97756d643dfebcfc5b716ab657d15a7b)) - things go smoother ([989ae26](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/989ae2638f7b2ff7976b177111642474dc6af245)) - fix tools/terrain not leveling/coming with objects ([4e8790c](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/4e8790c628972b86321caf4805e4f69d981d70d9)) - some dungeon stuff (not done) and bug fix for doc saving ([b3c28ed](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/b3c28ed0e779022722bc2ebf56c3f1b9720809d7)) - fix save process of portal ([ec51ebc](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/ec51ebcbeee59f7b3b1a757f582c8cbc5579bae1)) - Trigger Build Edge ([3438f4d](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/3438f4d99a5a5be8b0b5ec73653d53f7d08258fb)) - readme ([57a902c](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/57a902c35b6ddc7218babd7e2bc1d196851f1758)) - Release setup: ACME-WorldBuilderInstall.exe, logo, work flows ([8b40a7d](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/8b40a7d4f948eee779635b7cd3ebed1a03135480)) - Update README with all current features and beta disclaimer ([e593725](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/e593725dcb01ec1d0e180f54d6c316aa4babb27d)) - Add demo recording system for promo videos ([984adef](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/984adef09d8afe71171f67ffc9e670635599372d)) - Add spell, skill, vital, experience, chargen, spellset, and layout editors ([71a37e7](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/71a37e76ec3b24fda848f775cd24ae5fb0e49946)) - Upgrade DatReaderWriter to 2.1.2, fix portal rendering pipeline and texture export ([c96fff1](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/c96fff135184c3013d7e86432d88f5666b3982f0)) - dungeon stuff from other laptop ([09a0017](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/09a0017e71c886855944a86235427ee01f9edff4)) - Add dungeon static object placement, surface editing, and visual improvements ([e2aaba5](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/e2aaba584538a46779b6b9722f9cc50614127cdf)) - Add dungeon static object rendering, undo/redo, and selection visualization ([7b721a7](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/7b721a76ddc06ca8cc40eaf40c1f93d878a65c1f)) - Add dungeon building workflow with room palette and portal snapping ([44685e6](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/44685e668b7c03e99f8c1768bf04a894c31feb2b)) - add dugeon shell with location search database for goto ([07ba04a](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/07ba04ab5a8fc7f020b32078e1a9d15da9a5f9b4)) - Add sections layout mode to dock regions ([3c50da3](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/3c50da311232616b868797fd6a48b0afc54eaf9c)) - Fix LandscapeEditorView encoding (UTF-8 no BOM), float-dock visibility, and set C# charset in editorconfig ([5335fb4](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/5335fb4b3dbb267cb00bea89d8ca951331b88822)) - Replace drag-to-dock with dropdown menu on viewport panels ([1b2e49f](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/1b2e49f43c8b836ed15a79a6aeb9492858221232)) - Add camera bookmarks panel, fix navigation using stale CameraManager.Current ([48bb8c7](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/48bb8c78937339a8f10810df2e7bd6aaf0199319)) - readme ([e0b2e58](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/e0b2e58a25124359ac49aae2b0c37ced3f78ce9d)) - swap install/appdata folders, fix thumbnail render ([140879b](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/140879b0ec5cc20a51edcf437cee454e3da4ac87)) - Overhaul editor UI: dark purple theme and more ([ddd1674](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/ddd1674c5e06a7237606221b9a064f474ce11eae)) - Add Clear Cache toolbar button to flush stale texture/terrain caches ([99414b0](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/99414b0e93b1c9e2d2c65b793fe255b5d3c8518b)) - Wire up keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+G/Z/Y/C/V, Delete, Escape) via viewport KeyAction event ([a852178](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/a852178a390c7b11f3526067ec7b9aa999b1bb2d))
